mapper.sql: id, category_alias, name_cn, name_en, parent_id, path, sort_order, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id

SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE path LIKE CONCAT( (SELECT path FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE category_alias = #{categoryAlias} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1), '%' ) AND status = 1 ORDER BY path, sort_order, id
SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY path, sort_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_category_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND resource_type = 'api'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND resource_type = 'event'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND resource_type = 'callback'

SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_category_t WHERE id IN
CAST(#{idStr} AS UNSIGNED)
ORDER BY path
